description: A customer placed two separate orders going to the same address within a few hours. A warehouse agent wants to combine them into one shipment to save costs.

nodes.task_description: Identify multiple open orders from the same customer going to the same address.

expected_outcome.value: System flags two orders from the same customer that can be combined.

nodes.task_description: Merge the two orders into a single fulfillment order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully merges the orders in the system.

nodes.task_description: Refund any excess shipping charges back to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes a partial refund for the saved shipping cost.
